since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.19%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC +0.84% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 +0.32%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.19%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.19%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +13.51%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +13.51%, META +6.06%, UEC +4.08%, NVDA +3.61%, AMAT +2.65%. Laggards: OKTA -6.26%, RXRX -5.98%, S -5.75%, CRWD -5.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.32% at $148.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
